raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "engine.py", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Verify calibration of IRT parameters and estimate SEM impact if guessed"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "question pool", "issue": "Question pool size per competency may be less than 15", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size to minimum 15 for CAT differentiation and 30+ for reliable theta estimation"}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers in some questions", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as needed"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be appropriate", "recommended_fix": "Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal performance"}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "temporal decay", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based", "recommended_fix": "Review research and adjust temporal decay rationale as needed"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Verify calibration of IRT parameters and estimate SEM impact if guessed

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency may be less than 15
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to minimum 15 for CAT differentiation and 30+ for reliable theta estimation

findings.issue: Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers in some questions
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as needed

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal performance
Review research and adjust temporal decay rationale as needed
